allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 Id, ProcessName, StartTime")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const src=fs.readFileSync\('src/User/Landing.jsx','utf8'\); console.log\('lines:', src.split\('\\\\n'\).length\); console.log\('chars:', src.length\);")

PowerShell($old = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($old\) { Stop-Process -Id $old -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "src/server.js" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\apphr_backend" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $r = try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/health' -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $null }; $new = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; "Old PID: $old, New PID: $new, Health: $\(if \($r\) { 'OK' } else { 'FAIL' }\)")

PowerShell($today = \(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'\); $body = @{ email='h0029@apphr.test'; password='H0029@123' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/auth/login' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $records = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/checkins?scope=team' -Headers $headers; $todays = $records | Where-Object { $_.dateKey -eq $today }; "Today=$today; total team records=$\($records.Count\); today's records=$\($todays.Count\)"; $todays | ForEach-Object { "  id=$\($_.id\) owner=$\($_.ownerKey\) time=$\($_.time\) loc=$\($_.location\) checkOutTime=$\($_.checkOutTime\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{ email='h0029@apphr.test'; password='H0029@123' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/auth/login' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; "=== /auth/me ==="; $me = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/auth/me' -Headers $headers; "id=$\($me.user.id\) empId=$\($me.user.employeeId\) dept=$\($me.user.profile.job.department\)"; "=== team checkins ==="; $cs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/checkins?scope=team' -Headers $headers; $cs | ForEach-Object { "id=$\($_.id\) ownerKey=$\($_.ownerKey\) ownerId=$\($_.ownerId\) employeeId=$\($_.employeeId\) dateKey=$\($_.dateKey\) time=$\($_.time\) loc=$\($_.location\) co=$\($_.checkOutTime\) status=$\($_.status\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{ email='h0029@apphr.test'; password='H0029@123' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/auth/login' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; "=== requests ==="; $rs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/requests?scope=approver' -Headers $headers; $rs | ForEach-Object { "id=$\($_.id\) ownerKey=$\($_.ownerKey\) type=$\($_.type\) status=$\($_.status\) startDateKey=$\($_.startDateKey\) endDateKey=$\($_.endDateKey\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{ email='h0042@apphr.test'; password='H0042@123' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/auth/login' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; $h = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($login.token\)" }; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/requests/REQ-802637' -Method Delete -Headers $h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)

PowerShell($body = @{ email='h0029@apphr.test'; password='H0029@123' } | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/auth/login' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; $h = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($login.token\)" }; $cs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/checkins?scope=team' -Headers $h; "Total team records=$\($cs.Count\); today=2026-05-20"; $cs | ForEach-Object { "id=$\($_.id\) owner=$\($_.ownerKey\) dateKey='$\($_.dateKey\)' time='$\($_.time\)' loc='$\($_.location\)' co='$\($_.checkOutTime\)' status='$\($_.status\)' createdAt=$\($_.createdAt\)" })
